mapper.select: select * from aiw_user where biz_id = #{bizId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user (biz_id, user_no, status, version, registered_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, deleted_at) values (#{bizId}, #{userNo}, #{status}, #{version}, #{registeredAt}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt}) on duplicate key update status = values(status), version = values(version), last_login_at = values(last_login_at), updated_at = values(updated_at), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), deleted_at = values(deleted_at)
